headline: NYLI CBRE Global Infrastructure Megatrends Term Fund (NYSE: MEGI) Declares Monthly Distributions for March, April and May 2026 and Availability of 19(a) Notice
summary: NEW YORK, March 13, 2026--NYLI CBRE Global Infrastructure Megatrends Term Fund (the "Fund") (NYSE: MEGI) today declared three distributions of $0.1250 per common share for the months of March, April, and May 2026. The Fund’s current annualized distribution rate is 9.97% based upon the closing price of $15.05 on March 11, 2026, and 8.93% based upon the Fund’s closing NAV of $16.80 as of the same date.
